channel.title: Exploring GitOps
channel.description: GitOps and FluxCD: from understanding the paradigm to running production-grade continuous delivery in Kubernetes.

item.title: Deploying Platform Services with Flux and OCI Artifacts
item.description: Your edge stack — Traefik, cert-manager, external-dns — deployed with zero manual commands: a versioned OCI artifact, a Flux Kustomization, and nothing else.

item.title: Flux Resources Explained
item.description: A plain-language reference to the Flux resources developers meet in a cluster: OCIRepository, Kustomization, HelmRelease, and GitRepository explained.

item.title: Overview
item.description: GitOps explained for developers and new team members. Learn what changed, why it changed, and how to work confidently with a FluxCD-enabled cluster.

item.title: Reading Flux Status
item.description: The kubectl commands that tell you whether Flux reconciled your changes — and how to read the error conditions when reconciliation fails.

item.title: What Is GitOps?
item.description: GitOps explained from first principles — what problem it solves, how declared desired state drives your cluster, and where FluxCD fits in.

item.title: Your Flux Workflow
item.description: How enterprise GitOps works: your CI pipeline builds a versioned OCI artifact, Flux reads it from your artifact registry, and your cluster reconciles.

item.title: Home
item.description: A progressive guide to GitOps and FluxCD — from understanding the paradigm to running production-grade continuous delivery in Kubernetes.
